tasks.subject: Task 1: Server — inline COA creation + remove no-COA gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** qcReviewReceivingRecord() accepts optional inline COA data, creates a COA document from it, removes the hard 'no COA' gate, and preserves the lab-status and identity gates.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/db-storage.ts:1715-1827
- Modify: server/storage.ts:314
- Modify: server/routes.ts:1257-1286
- Create: server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts
- Modify: server/__tests__/t03-identity-gate.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- qcReviewReceivingRecord() accepts optional inlineCoa parameter
- Approving with no pre-existing COA + no inline data succeeds for COA_REVIEW workflow
- Approving with inline identityConfirmed: true for IDENTITY_CHECK succeeds
- Approving with inline identityConfirmed: false for IDENTITY_CHECK → 422
- A erp_coa_documents row is created when inlineCoa is provided
- Lab-status gate still rejects INACTIVE/DISQUALIFIED lab-linked COAs
- POST /api/receiving/:id/qc-review accepts inlineCoa in body

**Verify:** cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx vitest run server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts server/__tests__/t03-identity-gate.test.ts server/__tests__/t02-lab-gate.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/db-storage.ts", "server/storage.ts", "server/routes.ts", "server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx vitest run server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["qcReviewReceivingRecord accepts optional inlineCoa parameter", "COA_REVIEW approves with no pre-existing COA", "IDENTITY_CHECK approves with inline identityConfirmed: true", "IDENTITY_CHECK rejects with inline identityConfirmed: false", "COA row created when inlineCoa provided", "Lab-status gate preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Server — partial receipt inherits APPROVED status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** receivePOLineItem() sets new receiving record status to APPROVED when the existing lot is already APPROVED, and derives the proper qcWorkflowType for QUARANTINED/PENDING_QC lots instead of hardcoding EXEMPT.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/db-storage.ts:492-542
- Modify: server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Second receipt of APPROVED lot → new record has status APPROVED
- Second receipt of QUARANTINED lot → proper qcWorkflowType (not EXEMPT)
- REJECTED lot still blocks receipt (422)

**Verify:** cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx vitest run server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/db-storage.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx vitest run server/__tests__/r10-receiving-qc-redesign.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["APPROVED lot partial receipt produces APPROVED record", "QUARANTINED lot partial receipt produces proper workflow type", "REJECTED lot still blocks"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Client — remove CoaStatusSection + adaptive QC panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove standalone CoaStatusSection. Make QC section adaptive — hide for EXEMPT, show QC Inherited banner for partial receipts of approved lots.

**Files:**
- Modify: client/src/pages/receiving.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CoaStatusSection component and render removed
- EXEMPT records with no qcReviewedBy show QC Inherited banner
- EXEMPT records don't show QC review form
- COA_REVIEW/IDENTITY_CHECK/FULL_LAB_TEST records still show QC section
- TypeScript compiles without errors

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit + browser test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/receiving.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CoaStatusSection removed", "EXEMPT inherited-approval shows banner", "Active workflows still show QC section", "TypeScript clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Client — inline COA/identity sub-form in QC sign-off
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add workflow-type-aware inline fields to QC review form. COA_REVIEW = optional accordion. IDENTITY_CHECK = required identity fields. FULL_LAB_TEST = identity + lab details. Submit fields in POST body so server creates the COA document.

**Files:**
- Modify: client/src/pages/receiving.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- COA_REVIEW: optional COA accordion with sourceType + documentNumber + overallResult
- IDENTITY_CHECK: required identity fields; Submit disabled until identityConfirmed checked
- FULL_LAB_TEST: identity fields + labName + analystName + analysisDate + overallResult; Submit disabled until identityConfirmed checked
- inlineCoa included in POST body when workflow requires it
- TypeScript clean
- Browser: can approve a FULL_LAB_TEST lot end-to-end without hitting 422

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit + browser end-to-end test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/receiving.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/frederikhejlskov/Desktop/NEUROGAN-ERP && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["COA_REVIEW optional accordion shown", "IDENTITY_CHECK identity fields required", "FULL_LAB_TEST lab detail fields shown", "Submit disabled until identityConfirmed for identity workflows", "inlineCoa sent in POST body", "TypeScript clean"]}
```
